title: phyteuma scheuchzeri subsp. charmelii
intro: Phyteuma scheuchzeri subsp. charmelii, also known as Alpine Phyteuma, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and as an expectorant, due to its high content of sesquiterpenes and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been reported to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. Phyteuma scheuchzeri subsp. charmelii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support lung health and respiratory well-being.
